title: 10 medicinal preparations of Ammi visnaga  (khella)

preparations_list.preparation_desc: Ammi visnaga teas is used to alleviate various health issues. Its anti-inflammatory properties help in treating joint pain and arthritis by reducing swelling and stiffness. It can also be used to treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant properties, which loosen mucus and make it easier to cough up. Additionally, ammi visnaga teas have been shown to lower blood pressure and improve cardiac health.

Ammi visnaga tinctures is used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems such as constipation and bloating. It has anti-inflammatory properties that can help alleviate menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Additionally, ammi visnaga tinctures have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma, and may help to reduce inflammation and improve overall lung function.

Ammi visnaga decoctions is used to treat a variety of health issues. It has been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma by reducing inflammation and opening up airways. The decoction has also been used to soothe digestive issues like constipation and bloating, and even to reduce the severity of menstrual cramps in women. Its antispasmodic properties make it effective in treating various types of spasms, including those related to migraines and muscle cramps.

Ammi visnaga syrups is used to alleviate various health issues. The syrup is commonly used to treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis, asthma, and allergies by helping to ease congestion and reduce inflammation. It is also used to soothe digestive issues like constipation and irritable bowel syndrome (IBS). Additionally, the syrup has been shown to have anti-inflammatory properties, making it a natural remedy for treating menstrual cramps, arthritis, and other inflammatory conditions.

Ammi visnaga elixirs is used to alleviate various health issues. Its potent properties help to soothe respiratory problems such as asthma and bronchitis, relieving congestion and inflammation. It also aids in reducing menstrual cramps and pain, making it a natural remedy for women's health concerns. Additionally, ammi visnaga elixirs can be used to treat digestive issues like constipation and diarrhea, promoting overall well-being and relaxation.

Ammi visnaga capsules is used to alleviate various health issues. The capsule contains a unique compound called khellin, which has been traditionally used to treat respiratory problems such as asthma and bronchitis. It also helps in reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues like constipation and diarrhea, and even alleviates menstrual cramps and pain associated with PMS. Additionally, it is known to lower blood pressure and improve circulation.

Ammi visnaga tablets is used to alleviate a range of digestive issues, including indigestion, flatulence, and bloating. Its anti-inflammatory properties help to reduce inflammation in the gastrointestinal tract, making it effective for treating conditions such as irritable bowel syndrome (IBS). Additionally, ammi visnaga tablets have been traditionally used to treat menstrual cramps, joint pain, and respiratory issues like asthma and bronchitis, making it a holistic remedy for overall well-being.

Ammi visnaga ointments is used to alleviate various health issues. These ointments are effective in treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis, asthma, and allergies, as well as skin conditions like eczema and dermatitis. Additionally, they can be used to reduce inflammation and pain associated with arthritis, rheumatism, and gout. The anti-inflammatory properties of Ammi visnaga ointments also make them useful in treating earaches, sinus infections, and sore throats.

Ammi visnaga salves is used to alleviate various health concerns. It is particularly effective in treating menstrual cramps, bloating, and other symptoms associated with PMS. The salve can also be applied topically to relieve joint pain and inflammation, making it a natural remedy for arthritis and rheumatism. Additionally, its anti-inflammatory properties make it an excellent treatment for skin conditions such as eczema and acne.

Ammi visnaga creams is used to alleviate various health issues. Its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties make it an effective treatment for menstrual cramps, digestive problems, and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Additionally, the cream can be used topically to soothe skin irritations, reduce joint pain, and even help with eye disorders like glaucoma. Its natural ingredients also promote wound healing and reduce swelling.

intro: Ammi visnaga has several medicinal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules. These preparations are useful for relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis, asthma, and chronic coughs. The plant's active compound, visnagin, is responsible for its anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in reducing swelling and pain. Additionally, khella has been used to treat digestive disorders like dyspepsia and irritable bowel syndrome (IBS).
intro_desc: Ammi visnaga has several medicinal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules. These preparations are useful for treating respiratory conditions, including bronchitis and asthma. The plant's extracts are also used to relieve anxiety and stress, promote relaxation, and help with sleep disorders. Additionally, khella's anti-inflammatory properties make it beneficial for treating rheumatism and arthritis symptoms. It is often combined with other herbal remedies to enhance its therapeutic effects.
